name: Something Something Games
short_description: Edinburgh duo Jamie and Ian Wilson — a Scottish studio chasing fresh design challenges with playful, characterful games since 2016.
about: Something Something Games is a Scottish studio in Edinburgh, founded in 2018 and led by brothers Jamie and Ian Wilson. Working as a pair since 2016, they focus on design problems that haven’t been done to death, and their projects reflect the humour and curiosity they bring to making games.
